detaileddescription.para: Defines the prefix for MLInputResult codes.

briefdescription.para: Operation failed because a required permission has not been granted. Example: This can happen when the app is not in the foreground.

detaileddescription.para: Operation failed because a required device was not found.
Operation failed because the service was in an illegal state. Example: This can occur when the service is still initializing.
Operation failed because of an internal error.
Operation failed because a required speech feature is disabled in system settings.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: Return values for Input API calls.

detaileddescription.para: Maximum recognized number of input controllers.
Maximum recognized number of controller touchpad touches.
End(Default).
Continue.
Start.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Touchpad gesture state.
None.
Tap. This is a discrete gesture.
Force tap down. This is a discrete gesture.
Force tap up. This is a discrete gesture.
Force dwell. This is a discrete gesture.
Second force down. This is a discrete gesture.
Radial scroll. This is a continuous gesture.
Swipe. This is a continuous gesture.
Number of gesture types.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Recognized touchpad gesture types.
None.
Up.
Down.
Left.
Right.
Clockwise.
Counter clockwise.
Number of directions.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Direction of touchpad gesture.
None.
Device.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Types of input controllers recognized by Magic Leap platform.
Bumper.
Menu.
Number of buttons.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Buttons on input controllers.
This is used when trigger is pulled down, and the normalized value is > 0.
This is used when trigger is fully released, and the normalized value is 0.
This is used when trigger is pulled and released within a short duration.
This is used when trigger is pulled and held for a longer duration.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Trigger events types.
Pre-defined pattern used for VKB hover.
Pre-Defined pattern used for VKB select.
Pre-Defined pattern used for homemenu hover.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Custom haptics pattern types.
None.
Pattern is a buzz command.
Pattern is a pre-defined pattern.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Custom haptics pattern types.
None.
Left hand.
Right hand.
Both hand.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: Hand in which the controller is held.
Return values for Input API calls.

detaileddescription.para: Touchpad gesture state.
Recognized touchpad gesture types.
Direction of touchpad gesture.
A structure containing information about recognized touchpad gesture.
Types of input controllers recognized by Magic Leap platform.
Buttons on input controllers.
Trigger events types.
Custom haptics pattern types.
Custom haptics pattern types.

briefdescription.para: Hand in which the controller is held.
A structure containing callbacks for input controller events.

detaileddescription.para: The final parameter to all the callbacks is a void *, which will point to whatever payload data the user provides in MLInputSetControllerCallbacksEx. Individual callbacks which are not required by the client can be NULL.
This structure must be initialized by calling MLInputControllerCallbacksExInit() before use.

briefdescription.para: A structure containing information about the current state of an input controller.
A structure containing information about the connected devices.
A structure containing information about the Pre-Defined pattern to be played.

detaileddescription.para:
API Level:\n 20
When playing haptic pre-defined pattern, needed information is stored in this structure.

briefdescription.para: A structure containing information about the Buzz command to be played.

detaileddescription.para:
API Level:\n 20
When playing haptic buzz command, needed information is stored in this structure.

briefdescription.para: A structure containing information about the Buzz command and/or pre-defined pattern to be played.

detaileddescription.para: A custom haptics pattern can be played by combining Buzz haptic command and/or a pre-defined pattern, this structure will hold info of a pattern to be added to the custom haptics array. A MLInputCustomHapticsType should be set while initializing the struct to indicate whether the to-be set pattern is a buzz command or a pre-defined pattern.

The #duration will set the time for which a pattern is played:
If the inherited duration of a pre-defined pattern is greater, then it will be cut short and the next pattern will start playing.
If the inherited duration of a pre-defined pattern is smaller, then it will not repeat itself and will wait for the #duration to complete before starting to play the next pattern.
Buzz command's duration will supersede the #duration. Above caveat is true in case buzz command's duration is smaller.
The last pattern of the array will continue playing even if the inherited duration is longer than #duration unless the pattern is interrupted by another pattern in the pipeline.

briefdescription.para: A structure containing a list of Buzz command and/or pre-defined patterns to be played.

detaileddescription.para:
API Level:\n 20
A custom haptics pattern can be played by combining Buzz haptic command and/or a pre-defined pattern, this structure holds a list of such a combination.

briefdescription.para: Initializes default values for MLInputControllerCallbacksEx.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default settings.

briefdescription.para: A structure containing information about the current state of an input controller.

inbodydescription.para: Current touch position (x,y) and force (z). Position is in the [-1.0,1.0] range and force is in the [0.0,1.0] range.
If this controller's touch is active.
Hardware index of this controller. For ML2 physical controller this value will always be 0.

briefdescription.para: Initializes values for MLInputControllerStateEx.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize.

briefdescription.para: Initializes default values for MLInputConnectedDevicesList.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default settings.

briefdescription.para: Initializes default values for MLInputPreDefinedPattern.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default settings.

briefdescription.para: Initializes default values for MLInputBuzzCommand.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default settings.

briefdescription.para: Initializes an array of MLInputCustomHaptics with default values.

parameterdescription.para: The object to MLInputCustomHapticsInfo struct to initialize the array elements with default settings.

briefdescription.para: Returns an ASCII string for MLInputsResult and MLResult codes.

parameterdescription.para: The input MLResult enum from MLInput functions.

simplesect.para: ASCII string containing readable version of result code.

briefdescription.para: Creates an input tracker.

parameterdescription.para: A handle to the created input tracker. Only valid if the return value is MLResult_Ok.
Failed to create the input tracker to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully created the input tracker.
Failed to create the input tracker due to an unknown error.
Failed to create the input tracker due to an unexpected state.

briefdescription.para: Sets the callbacks for controller input events.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to the input tracker.
Pointer to MLInputControllerCallbacksEx structure (can be NULL).
Pointer to user payload data; this will be the first argument passed to all the callback functions (can be NULL).
Failed to set the callback for controller input events due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully set the callback for controller input events.
Failed to set the callback for the controller input events due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Returns current state of all possible input controllers.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to the input tracker.
Array of MLInputControllerState structures that will be populated. The size of this array is at least the size MLInput_MaxControllers.
Failed to fetch the controller state due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully fetched the controller state.
Failed to fetch the controller state due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Returns current state of all possible input controllers.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to the input tracker.
Array of MLInputControllerStateEx structures that will be populated. The size of this array is at least the size MLInput_MaxControllers.
Failed to fetch the controller state due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully fetched the controller state.
Failed to fetch the controller state due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Gets the device IDs of all connected devices.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to the input tracker.
Pointer to MLInputConnectedDevicesList structure that will be populated. The app should call MLInputReleaseConnectedDevicesList to release the contents after use.
Failed to get the IDs of all connected devices due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully fetched the IDs of the connected devices.
Failed to get the IDs of all connected devices due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Releases the contents of MLInputConnectedDevicesList populated by MLInputGetConnectedDevices.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to the input tracker.
Pointer to MLInputConnectedDevicesList struct. Its contents will be released.
Successfully released the contents of the device list.
Failed to release the contents of the device list due to an invalid input parameter.
Failed to release the contents of the device list due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Plays the pre-defined pattern.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to the input tracker.
Id of the input controller 0 ~ MLInput_MaxControllers.
A pointer to #MLInputPredefinedPattern structure (can be NULL).
The service is either not initialized or terminated or the app is not in focus.
The haptic device could not be found.
Failed to start a pre-defined pattern due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully started a pre-defined pattern on the specified controller.
Failed to start a pre-defined pattern due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Plays controller haptic buzz command.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to the input tracker.
Id of the input controller 0 ~ MLInput_MaxControllers.
A pointer to MLInputBuzzCommand structure (can be NULL).
The service is either not initialized or terminated or the app is not in focus.
The haptic device could not be found.
Failed to start the buzz command due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully started the buzz command on the specified controller.
Failed to start the buzz command due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Creates a custom haptic pattern.

detaileddescription.para:
API Level:\n 20
A custom haptics pattern is defined as a set of either buzz command and/or pre-defined patterns. Each pattern is played for a duration defined as the #duration_ms member of each element of the MLInputCustomHaptics array.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to the input tracker.
Pointer to MLInputCustomHapticsInfo struct.
A pattern Id created by the API, to be used by MLInputStartControllerFeedbackCustomHapticsPattern.
The service is either not initialized or terminated.
Failed to create a custom haptic pattern due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully created a custom haptic pattern.
Failed to create a custom haptic pattern due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Plays the custom haptic pattern created by MLInputCreateCustomHapticsPattern.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to the input tracker.
Id of the input controller 0 ~ MLInput_MaxControllers.
Custom pattern id created by MLInputCreateCustomHapticsPattern.
The service is either not initialized or terminated or the app is not in focus.
The haptic device could not be found.
Failed to start the custom haptic pattern due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully started the custom haptic pattern on the specified controller.
Failed to start the custom haptic pattern due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Deletes the custom haptic pattern created by MLInputCreateCustomHapticsPattern.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to the input tracker.
Custom pattern Id created by MLInputCreateCustomHapticsPattern.
The service is either not initialized or terminated.
Failed to destroy the custom haptic pattern due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully destroyed the custom haptic pattern on the specified controller.
Failed to destroy the custom haptic pattern due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Stops the currently playing haptic pattern.

parameterdescription.para: Handle to the input tracker.
Id of the input controller 0 ~ MLInput_MaxControllers.
The service is either not initialized or terminated or the app is not in focus.
The haptic device could not be found.
Failed to stop the pattern due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully stopped the pattern on the specified controller.
Failed to stop the pattern due to an unknown error.

briefdescription.para: Destroys an input tracker.

parameterdescription.para: MLHandle to the input tracker to destroy.
Failed to destroy the input tracker due to an invalid input parameter.
Successfully destroyed the input tracker.
Failed to destroy the input handler due to an unknown error.
Failed to destroy the input handler due to an unexpected state.
